# Zuki Apps — machine-readable site index
# Human-readable marketing site for a small independent app publisher (Israel).
# Conventions: https://llmstxt.org/ (informal; not all clients honor this file.)

## Identity
- Publisher name: Zuki Apps
- Site origin: https://zukiapps.com/
- About page (publisher story): https://zukiapps.com/about
- Site type: Public marketing website (no user login on the site itself; apps are on App Store / Google Play).
- Support email (listed on support/legal pages): zuki.apps.dev@gmail.com
- Languages: en, he, de, es, it, pt, ru, fr, ja, ko, ar, zh (default public URLs often omit /en for English).

## Discovery (use these for crawling)
- Sitemap (all public routes): https://zukiapps.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://zukiapps.com/robots.txt
- Web manifest (PWA hints): https://zukiapps.com/manifest.json
- This file: https://zukiapps.com/llms.txt
- Short AI discovery stub: https://zukiapps.com/ai.txt
- JSON catalog snapshot (apps + schema.org ItemList mirror): https://zukiapps.com/api/site-facts

## Structured data
- Pages emit one JSON-LD `@graph` (schema.org): Organization (publisher), WebSite (with `mainEntity` → software catalog), ItemList of product URLs. App product pages may also emit SoftwareApplication where implemented.
- Home page also emits FAQPage JSON-LD (and shows the same Q&A in HTML) for common questions about Zuki Apps and this site.
- Canonical URLs and hreflang alternates are in HTML `<head>` and in `sitemap.xml` per locale.

## Answer engines (AEO) — factual Q&A
- **Who is Zuki Apps?** An independent mobile app publisher; developer based in Israel; previously developed Android and iOS apps as part of DreamBit Apps (2012–2016); apps today built with Flutter for iOS and Android.
- **What is this website?** Public marketing site: app descriptions, store links when available, support email, and per-app Privacy / Terms pages.
- **How do I contact support?** Email: zuki.apps.dev@gmail.com (also on app support pages and policies).
- **Where are legal / DSA details?** EU trader and compliance hub: /dsa-compliance. App-specific privacy and terms: /{app}/privacy and /{app}/terms (e.g. /zulist/privacy).
- **Is there a public API?** No documented public REST API for end users on this site.
- **What apps are listed?** ZuList, Hush Gallery, Whistle Camera, ToldYa!, Zuli Collage, Time Since, GEO Calc, Power Interval Timer, Sudoku Fun Go, Football Trivia Master, Fun Facts! Trivia, Bit Scope, Track Ledger, Noise Meter — Shusher, Paratrooper Blitz, TempoLab Pro (at /tempo-lab-pro); plus DreamBit legacy archive.

## Main pages
- Home: https://zukiapps.com/
- DSA / legal hub: https://zukiapps.com/dsa-compliance

## App product pages (canonical paths; each may have /privacy, /terms, /support where implemented)
Format: App name — URL — one-line summary

- Hush Gallery — https://zukiapps.com/hush-gallery — Private photo/video vault: Share from WhatsApp or Photos, tags, PIN/biometric App Lock (Premium), optional iCloud/Google Drive backup. Android com.zuki.apps.hushGallery; iOS App Store id6756169045. FAQ, user manual, tips, and screenshots on the product page. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/hush-gallery-icon.png
  - Support & FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/hush-gallery/support
  - Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/hush-gallery/privacy
  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/hush-gallery/terms
  - Support & FAQ (20 Q&A, FAQPage schema): https://zukiapps.com/hush-gallery/support
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/hush-gallery/faq.md
  - Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/hush-gallery/privacy
  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/hush-gallery/terms
  - iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/il/app/hush-gallery/id6756169045
  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.hushGallery
  - Key features: private local vault, Share Extension (iOS) / share intent (Android), tags, batch ops, Premium App Lock + cloud backup, 12+ languages
- Whistle Camera — https://zukiapps.com/whistle-camera — Hands-free camera: whistle to snap selfies, pet photos, and Pro video. Practice whistle calibration, 0–100 frequency band tuning, widgets, Siri shortcuts, in-app gallery, offline capture. Android com.zuki.apps.whistlecamera; iOS App Store id1037716421. FAQ, manual, tips, screenshots on product page. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/whistle-camera-icon.png?v=1
  - Support & FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/whistle-camera/support
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/whistle-camera/faq.md
  - Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/whistle-camera/privacy
  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/whistle-camera/terms
  - iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id1037716421
  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.whistlecamera
  - Key features: hands-free whistle shutter, Practice mode calibration, pet & selfie use cases, front/rear camera, countdown timer, in-app gallery, Pro whistle video start/stop, Home Screen widgets & Siri shortcuts, 40+ languages
- Power Interval Timer — https://zukiapps.com/power-interval-timer — Tabata / HIIT interval timer with custom work/rest rounds, presets, display modes, audio cues, offline timing. Android com.zuki.apps.powerintervaltimer; iOS App Store id6758246007. FAQ, tips, and screenshots on the product page. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/power-interval-timer-icon.png
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/power-interval-timer/faq.md
  - Support: https://zukiapps.com/power-interval-timer/support
  - Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/power-interval-timer/privacy
  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/power-interval-timer/terms
  - iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/power-interval-timer/id6758246007
  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.powerintervaltimer
  - Key features: Tabata & HIIT presets, custom work/rest rounds, large countdown display, audio cues, offline timing, 12+ languages
- Sudoku Fun Go — https://zukiapps.com/sudoku-puzzle — Classic Sudoku puzzle game with multiple difficulties, hints, statistics, and clean grid UI. Android com.zuki.apps.sudokufungo; iOS App Store id6759739806. FAQ and screenshots on the product page. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/sudoku-puzzle-icon.png
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/sudoku-puzzle/faq.md
  - Support: https://zukiapps.com/sudoku-puzzle/support
  - Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/sudoku-puzzle/privacy
  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/sudoku-puzzle/terms
  - iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/sudoku-fun-go/id6759739806
  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.sudokufungo
  - Key features: Easy to expert difficulty, hints, notes, win/streak statistics, clean minimal grid, 12+ languages
- Football Trivia Master — https://zukiapps.com/football-trivia — 450+ timed soccer quiz questions, streaks, leaderboards, 12 languages. FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/football-trivia/faq.md · Android com.zuki.apps.footballtrivia; iOS App Store id6759739806.
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/football-trivia/faq.md
  - Support: https://zukiapps.com/football-trivia/support
  - Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/football-trivia/privacy
  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/football-trivia/terms
  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.footballtrivia
  - Key features: 450+ football/soccer questions, timed rounds, streak scoring, global leaderboards, category stats, 12+ languages
- Fun Facts! Trivia — https://zukiapps.com/fun-facts-trivia — Multi-category timed trivia quiz with leaderboards, category unlocks, and 12+ languages. Android com.zuki.apps.funfactstrivia; iOS App Store id6762831794. FAQ, tips, and screenshots on the product page. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/fun-facts-trivia-icon.png

  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.funfactstrivia
  - Key features: timed rounds, multiple categories (science, history, sports, etc.), global leaderboards, answer explanations, 12+ languages
- Bit Scope — https://zukiapps.com/bit-scope — Bit-level calculator and converter for developers: binary/hex/octal/decimal, IEEE 754 floats, CRC, hashes, interactive bit canvas, batch convert, home-screen widgets. Android com.zuki.apps.bitscope; iOS App Store id6759933934. FAQ, tips, and screenshots on the product page. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/bit-scope-icon.png
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/bit-scope/faq.md
  - Support: https://zukiapps.com/bit-scope/support
  - Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/bit-scope/privacy
  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/bit-scope/terms
  - iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/il/app/bit-scope-converter/id6759933934
  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.bitscope
  - Key features: 8/16/32/64-bit integers + custom width, Float16/32/64 IEEE 754, bitwise ops (AND/OR/XOR/NOT/shifts), interactive bit canvas, CRC & hash (Premium), home-screen widgets, 12+ languages
- Track Ledger — https://zukiapps.com/track-ledger — Offline-first GPS/GNSS track logger: record raw points, elevation profiles, OpenStreetMap overlay, export CSV (free) or GPX/GeoJSON (Premium). Android com.zuki.apps.trackledger; iOS App Store id6762567364. FAQ, tips, and screenshots on the product page. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/track-ledger-icon.png
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/track-ledger/faq.md
  - Support: https://zukiapps.com/track-ledger/support
  - Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/track-ledger/privacy
  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/track-ledger/terms
  - iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/il/app/track-ledger-log-gps-data/id6762567364
  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.trackledger
  - Key features: raw GNSS point logging, elevation vs distance charts, OSM map overlay, project organization, CSV export (free), GPX/GeoJSON (Premium), 12+ languages
- Noise Meter — Shusher — https://zukiapps.com/noise-meter-shusher — Real-time decibel meter with live gauge, timed sessions, noise scores, Shusher in-app threshold alerts, on-device history, and Premium charts/CSV export. Android com.zuki.apps.noisemeter; iOS App Store id6763019075. FAQ, tips, and screenshots on the product page. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/noise-meter-shusher-icon.png
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/noise-meter-shusher/faq.md
  - Support: https://zukiapps.com/noise-meter-shusher/support

  - iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/il/app/noise-meter-shusher/id6763019075
  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.noisemeter
  - Key features: live dB gauge and waveform, timed sessions, noise category scoring, Shusher threshold alerts, on-device history, Premium charts & CSV export, 12+ languages
- Paratrooper Blitz — https://zukiapps.com/paratrooper-blitz — Retro anti-air arcade game: Arcade (slide-and-shoot) and Classic (aim-and-fire) modes, leaderboards, 14 achievements, 12+ languages. Android com.zuki.apps.paratrooperblitz; iOS App Store id6763775995. FAQ, tips, and screenshots on the product page. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/paratrooper-blitz-icon.png

  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.paratrooperblitz
  - Key features: Arcade slide-and-shoot mode, Classic aim-and-fire mode, global leaderboards, 14 Game Center achievements, escalating waves, combo scoring, 12+ languages
- TempoLab Pro — https://zukiapps.com/tempo-lab-pro — Tempo, pitch, and audio practice lab for musicians: metronome, loop markers, tap tempo, EQ and effects, import/export backing tracks. Android com.zuki.apps.tempolabpro; iOS App Store id6760204327. FAQ, tips, and screenshots on the product page. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/tempo-lab-pro-icon.png

  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.tempolabpro
  - Key features: visual metronome, tap tempo, loop section markers, EQ and audio effects, import backing tracks, export presets, 12+ languages
- ZuList — https://zukiapps.com/zulist — Shared shopping lists with real-time sync, home-screen widgets, invite links (no account required for guests), and Premium tiers. Android com.zuki.apps.zulist; iOS App Store id6753878439. FAQ, tips, and screenshots on the product page. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/zulist-icon.png
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/zulist/faq.md
  - Support: https://zukiapps.com/zulist/support

  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/zulist/terms
  - iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/zulist/id6753878439
  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.zulist
  - Key features: real-time multi-device sync, invite links (guests need no account), item quantities & categories, home-screen widgets, check-off shopping mode, Premium tiers, 12+ languages
- Zuli Collage — https://zukiapps.com/zuli-collage — Photo collage maker: 2–10 photos, smart layouts, canvas shapes, filters, text, Layout Studio, 48 Zuli Monsters stickers (WhatsApp/iMessage). On-device editing, English & Hebrew RTL. Free on the App Store; Google Play coming soon (com.zuki.apps.collagio). FAQ and screenshots on the product page. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/zuli-collage-icon.webp
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/zuli-collage/faq.md
  - Support: https://zukiapps.com/zuli-collage/support
  - Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/zuli-collage/privacy
  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/zuli-collage/terms
  - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/il/app/zuli-collage/id6774583525
  - Google Play: coming soon (com.zuki.apps.collagio)
  - Key features: smart layouts, canvas shapes (square/story/portrait/heart), filters & text, Zuli Monsters stickers, Layout Studio, local history, optional Premium (no ads/watermark, hi-res export)
- ToldYa! — https://zukiapps.com/toldya — Invite-only social predictions app: post calls before they happen, Arena voting, reputation scores, comments, and DMs. Free, no ads, no IAP. English & Hebrew RTL. Android com.zuki.apps.toldya; iOS App Store id6756342206. Pilot landing page (indexed; not on home grid until launch). Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/toldya-icon.png
  - Support & FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/toldya/support
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/toldya/faq.md
  - Child safety (CSAE): https://zukiapps.com/toldya/child-safety
  - Delete account: https://zukiapps.com/toldya/delete-account
  - Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/toldya/privacy
  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/toldya/terms
  - iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/il/app/toldya-double-or-nothing/id6756342206
  - Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zuki.apps.toldya
  - Key features: invite-only social predictions, Arena community voting, reputation by category, comments & DMs, moderation & CSAE standards, English & Hebrew RTL, free with no ads
- Time Since — https://zukiapps.com/timesince — Streak tracker (quit & build modes, goal rings, widgets, share cards). Android com.zuki.apps.timesince; iOS App Store id6787023926. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/timesince-icon.png
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/timesince/faq.md
  - Support: https://zukiapps.com/timesince/support
  - Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/timesince/privacy
  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/timesince/terms
  - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/il/app/time-since-streak-tracker/id6787023926
  - Google Play: coming soon (com.zuki.apps.timesince)
  - Key features: quit & build streak modes, goal progress rings, personal records, shareable streak cards, iOS/Android widgets, 12 languages, local-only streak data, no account
- GEO Calc — https://zukiapps.com/geo-calc — Offline WGS84 coordinate tools. Convert DD, DMS, UTM, MGRS; Vincenty distance & bearing; map measure; GPX export. Android com.zuki.apps.geocalc; iOS App Store id6787519144. Icon: https://zukiapps.com/images/geo-calc-icon.png
  - Machine-readable FAQ: https://zukiapps.com/geo-calc/faq.md
  - Support: https://zukiapps.com/geo-calc/support
  - Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/geo-calc/privacy
  - Terms: https://zukiapps.com/geo-calc/terms
  - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/il/app/geo-calc-coordinates/id6787519144
  - Google Play: coming soon (com.zuki.apps.geocalc)
  - Key features: WGS84 converter, Vincenty geodesic distance, offline map measure, waypoints, GPX 1.1, metric/imperial/nautical units, 12 languages, no account

## Archive
- DreamBit legacy listings: https://zukiapps.com/dreambit-legacy

## Licensing / use of this content
- Marketing copy is for attribution and search/AI indexing; app-specific legal terms are on each app’s Terms/Privacy pages.
- Do not infer API keys, private user data, or non-public endpoints from this site; there is no public REST API documented here.

## Contact
- Developer / support: zuki.apps.dev@gmail.com (also embedded in app store listings and policies where applicable).
